name: /pr-source-remove error output enumerates every rule that depended on the removed source as sole evidence
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro pr-corpus/evidence && printf 'sources: []
operator_namespace: [{id: my-src}]
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && for r in r1 r2 r3; do printf "rule_id: $r
provenance:
  - {class: pr-corpus, source_id: my-src, sole_evidence: true}
" > pr-corpus/evidence/$r.yaml; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-remove.sh" my-src --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --evidence-dir pr-corpus/evidence 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'rule=r1' err.txt && grep -q 'rule=r2' err.txt && grep -q 'rule=r3' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
